source_jobs.title: Marketing Analyst
source_jobs.description:
About Patrianna

Patrianna is a fast-scaling iGaming powerhouse headquartered in Gibraltar, with 200+ colleagues across Europe and beyond powering apps and web products for millions of players worldwide. We blend technology, product development, and entertainment to deliver standout social gaming experiences — think tailored strategies, cutting-edge software, and daily innovation in a fully remote-friendly culture.

We're ambitious problem-solvers who value speed, ownership, and fresh ideas. Whether you're scaling functions or diving into data, you'll thrive here with the freedom to innovate and grow alongside like-minded people in our ego-free, high-growth environment.




THE ROLE

As our Marketing Analyst, you'll turn marketing data into actionable insights, optimizing campaigns for our social casino brands and driving real budget impact that directly shapes player experiences for millions worldwide.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Performance Analysis - Analyze campaign performance across channels to spot growth opportunities and boost efficiency through continuous learning and experimentation

 - Marketing Experimentation - Design and run experiments like Geo-lift tests to prove media spend value, taking ownership of results

 - Strategic Deep Dives - Lead ad-hoc analysis on issues like ROAS shifts or tracking gaps—working independently with full accountability for outcomes

 - KPI Excellence - Build and refine daily/weekly dashboards that deliver meaningful insights, not just data

 - Collaborative Impact - Partner with stakeholders in our flat hierarchy: turn their questions into analysis, then insights into strategies that create real-world results


WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - Marketing Expertise - Strong grasp of performance marketing: CPA, ROAS, LTV, attribution in high-pace environments

 - Technical Skills - Hands-on with tracking tools like Google Analytics 4, AppsFlyer, or Snowplow; solid SQL for querying and data work

 - Independent Thinking - Self-starter mindset who thrives on learning by doing and tackles business problems with minimal guidance

 - Visualization Mastery - Experience with Tableau, Looker, or Power BI to make insights clear and actionable for diverse teams

 - Communication Excellence - Translate complex findings into simple, impactful recommendations for marketers and partners across our global team


WHY YOU'LL LOVE IT HERE

High Pace, High Growth, Real Impact - Your analysis directly influences budgets for brands serving millions of players. Backed by our expert BI team, you'll enjoy full ownership of your work, flexibility to balance performance with personal well-being, and continuous opportunities to stretch yourself in a dynamic environment where your contributions are recognized and rewarded.

Work remotely with cutting-edge tech, grow alongside passionate colleagues who value open communication and mutual respect, and see your efforts create tangible results in the fast-evolving world of social gaming.

Equal Opportunities Statement

We hire based on skills, drive, and ideas—nothing else. Your background, gender, age, race, ethnicity, disability, sexual orientation, religion, neurodiversity, or educational path will never be a barrier to joining us. We welcome candidates from non-traditional career journeys and value diverse perspectives that fuel our innovation, collaboration, and growth in an environment where everyone can contribute their best work and thrive.

source_jobs.title: Senior Product Designer
source_jobs.description:
About Patrianna

Patrianna is a fast-scaling product development company headquartered in Gibraltar, with a dynamic, global team powering our growth. We operate at the intersection of technology and entertainment, building innovative solutions that shape the future of social gaming and deliver outstanding experiences to millions of players worldwide.

We're driven by speed, ambition, and bold ideas. At our core, we're product creators and problem-solvers who thrive in a high-performance environment. We're looking for exceptional talent—smart, adaptable, and motivated individuals eager to make an impact, scale business functions at pace, and continuously improve.

Whether you're a domain expert or an agile thinker who thrives in change, at Patrianna you'll have the freedom to innovate, take ownership, and help us lead the next wave of gaming innovation.

The Role
You'll own the design of player experience surfaces that directly impact conversion, using AI as your creative engine to ship thoughtful, high-performing designs faster than ever.

What you will be doing
• Lead AI-powered design workflows using cutting-edge AI tools (Figma AI, Midjourney, v0) to generate concepts, explore variations, and build interactive prototypes rapidly
• Design monetisation surfaces that convert, owning purchase flows, offer mechanics, onboarding, and loyalty features where great design directly translates to revenue
• Create CRM-connected experiences with dynamic UI that supports personalised offers and targeted promotions, balancing commercial goals with player trust
• Build rapid prototypes using Figma, Framer, and AI-generated code to validate concepts quickly and get feedback before engineering investment
• Deliver production-ready specs with detailed, developer-ready designs including motion, micro-interactions, and multiple states
• Collaborate across functions with Product Leads and CRM teams to ensure design actively shapes offer strategy

What we are looking for
• Solid product design experience with a portfolio showing high-quality UI/UX across complex, multi-state flows, ideally in gaming, social casino, or consumer apps with in-app purchases
• AI-native design fluency with hands-on professional experience using AI design tools (Midjourney, DALL-E, v0, Galileo AI) and examples of AI-assisted workflows
• Expert Figma skills including components, variants, auto-layout, prototyping, and developer handoff at a professional level
• Conversion-focused design experience having designed purchase flows, onboarding funnels, or promotional content where performance matters
• Technical awareness to build high-fidelity interactive prototypes with basic front-end literacy for effective engineer collaboration
• Strong communication skills to present and defend design decisions clearly to commercial and product leadership in fast-paced environments

Why you will love it
You'll be at the cutting edge of AI-assisted design, using breakthrough tools to create player experiences that millions will enjoy while seeing your work directly drive business success. Every challenge becomes a chance to push creative boundaries and sharpen your skills in our high-growth environment. You'll have genuine autonomy to innovate and take ownership of initiatives that shape both your role and the future of social gaming. With ego-free collaboration at our core, your ideas will be valued and heard, while our flexible approach means you can work in ways that bring out your best—all while being part of something bigger than just a paycheck.

Equal Opportunities Statement
We hire based on skills, drive, and ideas—nothing else. Your background, gender, age, race, ethnicity, disability, sexual orientation, religion, neurodiversity, or educational path will never be a barrier to joining us. We also welcome candidates from non-traditional career journeys and value diverse perspectives that challenge conventional thinking.

Diversity fuels our innovation, collaboration, and growth

source_jobs.title: Head of Product
source_jobs.description:
Patrianna is a fast-scaling product development company headquartered in Gibraltar, with a dynamic, global team powering our growth. We operate at the intersection of technology and entertainment, building innovative solutions that shape the future of social gaming and deliver outstanding experiences to millions of players worldwide.

We're driven by speed, ambition, and bold ideas. At our core, we're product creators and problem-solvers who thrive in a high-performance environment. We're looking for exceptional talent—smart, adaptable, and motivated individuals eager to make an impact, scale business functions at pace, and continuously improve.

Whether you're a domain expert or an agile thinker who thrives in change, at Patrianna you'll have the freedom to innovate, take ownership, and help us lead the next wave of gaming innovation.

The Role

Lead our product strategy and development lifecycle, transforming vision into reality while building and empowering a high-performing product team.

What you will be doing

 - Transform executive vision into concrete, actionable product plans and comprehensive roadmaps

 - Lead and develop a team of Product Owners/Managers, fostering their growth and performance

 - Own the entire product development process from ideation through to delivery

 - Collaborate with cross-functional stakeholders to champion new ideas and drive product execution

 - Develop well-researched product requirements and serve as the customer advocate

 - Stay ahead of market trends and competitor analysis to drive innovation and enhance customer experience

What we are looking for

 - Extensive experience with proven leadership capability across product strategy, delivery, and team management.

 - Strong expertise in defining product and business requirements within software development environments

 - Exceptional analytical and strategic thinking skills, transforming data into actionable insights

 - Outstanding communication and coordination abilities to guide complex technical projects

 - Goal-oriented mindset with a passion for innovation and continuous learning

 - Online gaming experience preferred, along with familiarity with Jira and product development tools

Why you will love it

At Patrianna, you'll be at the heart of our product innovation in the fast-scaling social gaming space. You'll have the freedom to shape product strategy while working with a dynamic, globally distributed team that values speed, ambition, and bold ideas. This is your chance to make a real impact from day one, driving products that reach millions of players worldwide while building and leading a world-class product function in a high-growth environment where your expertise will directly influence our trajectory.

We hire based on skills, drive, and ideas—nothing else. Your background, gender, age, race, ethnicity, disability, sexual orientation, religion, neurodiversity, or educational path will never be a barrier to joining us. We also welcome candidates from non-traditional career journeys and value diverse perspectives that challenge conventional thinking. Diversity fuels our innovation, collaboration, and growth, and we're committed to creating an environment where everyone can contribute their best work and thrive.

source_jobs.title: DevSecOps Engineer
source_jobs.description:
The Role
You'll design, implement, and continuously improve our security infrastructure while embedding security throughout our entire software development lifecycle.

What you will be doing
• Design and maintain security technologies including EDR solutions like CrowdStrike, Zero Trust Network Access, and Data Loss Prevention systems
• Integrate automated security testing into CI/CD pipelines, covering code analysis, dependency scanning, and secrets detection
• Implement and support Zero Trust security architecture using Palo Alto Prisma, GlobalProtect, and Cloudflare ZTNA solutions
• Manage cloud security posture controls across GCP environments, including misconfiguration detection and remediation
• Collaborate with SOC analysts to improve detection quality, reduce false positives, and enhance incident investigation capabilities
• Work with development teams during design phases to identify security risks early and perform security code reviews

What we are looking for
• Solid experience in security engineering, security operations, or security platform engineering
• Strong understanding of network security concepts including firewalls, VPNs, DNS, and network segmentation
• Hands-on experience implementing EDR solutions such as CrowdStrike and Zero Trust architectures
• Experience with Palo Alto Prisma, GlobalProtect, and Cloudflare security solutions
• Strong knowledge of Identity and Access Management (IAM) and Data Loss Prevention (DLP) controls
• Professional proficiency in English with strong analytical, investigative, and collaborative skills

Why you will love it
At Patrianna, you'll be at the forefront of securing cutting-edge social gaming experiences for millions of players worldwide. You'll have the freedom to innovate and take ownership of security solutions that directly impact our fast-scaling product development. Working in our high-performance, ego-free environment, you'll collaborate with brilliant minds across development, DevOps, and SOC teams while building your expertise in the latest security technologies. Every day brings new challenges and learning opportunities as you help shape the future of gaming security.

We hire based on skills, drive, and ideas—nothing else. Your background, gender, age, race, ethnicity, disability, sexual orientation, religion, neurodiversity, or educational path will never be a barrier to joining us. We also welcome candidates from non-traditional career journeys and value diverse perspectives that challenge conventional thinking. Diversity fuels our innovation, collaboration, and growth, and we're committed to creating an environment where everyone can contribute their best work and thrive.

source_jobs.title: Lead Product Manager (Monetisation)
source_jobs.description:
About Patrianna

Patrianna is a fast-scaling product development company headquartered in Gibraltar, with a dynamic, global team powering our growth. We operate at the intersection of technology and entertainment, building innovative solutions that shape the future of social gaming and deliver outstanding experiences to millions of players worldwide.

We're driven by speed, ambition, and bold ideas. At our core, we're product creators and problem-solvers who thrive in a high-performance environment. We're looking for exceptional talent—smart, adaptable, and motivated individuals eager to make an impact, scale business functions at pace, and continuously improve.

Whether you're a domain expert or an agile thinker who thrives in change, at Patrianna you'll have the freedom to innovate, take ownership, and help us lead the next wave of gaming innovation.

Lead Product Manager (Monetisation)

The Role
Lead our monetisation product area end-to-end, driving meaningful improvements to player engagement, offer effectiveness, and revenue growth while building and mentoring a high-performing cross-functional team.

What you will be doing
• Set direction for the monetisation team, own the product roadmap, and represent the squad in senior stakeholder forums while mentoring Product Managers and Product Owners
• Drive player lifetime value through engagement loops, coin packages, offer mechanics, and purchase strategies across the entire game lifecycle
• Use player segmentation and purchasing behaviour insights to prioritise product work and collaborate on CRM strategy to increase purchase frequency
• Build prototypes and MVPs using AI coding tools (Cursor, Claude, Lovable) to accelerate validation and coach the team on AI-assisted product development
• Translate revenue targets and commercial plans into product requirements while building trusted relationships across CRM, Marketing, Finance, and Engineering teams
• Maintain clear monetisation KPIs and ensure every team member understands what they're optimising for and why

What we are looking for
• Strong track record of owning and growing monetisation or revenue-generating product areas with demonstrated squad leadership skills
• Experience in social casino, free-to-play gaming, or comparable consumer products with virtual currency and in-app purchase mechanics
• Deep understanding of player spending psychology, offer design, and fluency in KPIs like ARPU, conversion rates, and LTV
• Proven ability to use AI coding assistants to independently build working prototypes and internal tools with strong prompting and output evaluation skills
• Comfortable working directly with BI tools to pull and interpret data without analyst dependency
• Clear, confident communicator able to influence senior stakeholders and make good decisions with incomplete information

Why you will love it
You'll thrive in our high-pace, high-growth environment where continuous learning meets real ownership. Every challenge becomes a chance to push boundaries and sharpen your skills, while our ego-free collaboration means your ideas are genuinely valued and heard. You'll step up to drive meaningful initiatives, see direct impact from your work, and enjoy the flexibility to shape your role while being rewarded for the results you deliver.

Equal Opportunities Statement
We hire based on skills, drive, and ideas—nothing else. Your background, gender, age, race, ethnicity, disability, sexual orientation, religion, neurodiversity, or educational path will never be a barrier to joining us. We also welcome candidates from non-traditional career journeys and value diverse perspectives that challenge conventional thinking.

Diversity fuels our innovation, collaboration, and growth, and we're committed to creating an environment where everyone can contribute their best work and thrive.

source_jobs.title: Associate Engineering Manager
source_jobs.description:
The Role
Lead cross-functional engineering teams building high-performance systems that power gaming experiences for millions of players worldwide.

AI-Driven Engineering Culture:
We are actively building an AI-driven engineering organization with a clear and deliberate stance: artificial intelligence is a core part of how we build and deliver software — not an experiment, not a trend, and not an optional add-on.
AI is embedded into our engineering workflows, from system design and prototyping to refactoring, testing, and code review. We expect engineers to be fully comfortable working in AI-driven environments and to treat AI as a primary productivity multiplier. Strong engineering judgment, architectural ownership, and accountability remain essential—AI amplifies our engineers, it doesn’t replace responsibility for technical decisions.

What you will be doing
• Own delivery outcomes for 1-2 teams (6-15 engineers), ensuring reliable delivery while tracking progress and surfacing risks early
• Manage people and career development through 1-on-1s, performance reviews, and day-to-day team leadership with guidance from senior leaders
• Maintain strong engineering standards across backend, frontend, mobile, and QA teams while ensuring quality and architectural consistency
• Stay technically hands-on (~30%), contributing to code, reviewing pull requests, and maintaining technical credibility within your teams
• Enable smooth team execution by working closely with Team Leads and Product Managers to define clear work and remove blockers
• Support system reliability by helping teams investigate incidents, understand root causes, and continuously improve platform stability

What we are looking for
• Strong software development background with solid backend expertise (ideally Java ecosystem) and distributed systems knowledge
• Emerging leadership experience as a Tech Lead, Team Lead, or similar role with a track record of helping others deliver and grow
• Interest in people management with either early experience or clear readiness to take on these responsibilities
• Strong delivery instincts with ability to track work progress, identify risks early, and keep teams moving without micromanagement
• Sound product sense to identify gaps, risks, and engineering implications in requirements
• Strong English communication skills for both technical and cross-functional discussions

Why you will love it
This is your chance to step into engineering leadership at a fast-scaling company where your decisions directly impact millions of players worldwide. You'll work with cutting-edge technology in a high-performance environment that values pragmatic execution over bureaucracy. We offer the perfect balance of hands-on technical work and leadership growth, with clear mentorship and support as you develop into a strong Engineering Manager. You'll have the freedom to shape engineering practices, work with highly skilled teams, and see real impact from day one—all while building systems that operate at massive scale in the exciting world of gaming.

source_jobs.title: Lead React Native Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT PATRIANNA

Patrianna is a fast-scaling product development company headquartered in Gibraltar, with a dynamic, global team powering our growth. We operate at the intersection of technology and entertainment, building innovative solutions that shape the future of social gaming and deliver outstanding experiences to millions of players worldwide.

Whether you’re a domain expert or an agile thinker who thrives in change, at Patrianna you’ll have the freedom to innovate, take ownership, and help us lead the next wave of gaming innovation.

Join us—and be part of something extraordinary.




AI-DRIVEN ENGINEERING CULTURE

We are actively building an AI-driven engineering organization with a clear and deliberate stance: artificial intelligence is a core part of how we build and deliver software — not an experiment, not a trend, and not an optional add-on.

AI is embedded into our engineering workflows, from system design and prototyping to refactoring, testing, and code review. We expect engineers to be fully comfortable working in AI-driven environments and to treat AI as a primary productivity multiplier. Strong engineering judgment, architectural ownership, and accountability remain essential—AI amplifies our engineers, it doesn’t replace responsibility for technical decisions.



The Role
Drive mobile innovation by leading our React Native development team while architecting scalable solutions for millions of gaming enthusiasts worldwide.



What you will be doing
• Write well-designed, testable, and scalable code that powers our mobile gaming experiences
• Lead the full development cycle from sprint planning to release, ensuring seamless collaboration between engineering teams and product owners
• Manage and streamline release processes for multiple mobile applications built from shared codebases
• Mentor and inspire the engineering team, fostering technical excellence and continuous learning
• Implement AI agents and automation tools to optimize code reviews and developer workflows

What we are looking for
• Proven expertise in React Native, TypeScript, TanStack Query, Zustand, React Navigation, and MMKV
• Deep understanding of monorepo architectures and building applications from scratch
• Strong experience with third-party integrations including external APIs, analytics, and payment gateways

• Hands-on experience with push notifications, deep links, and universal links

Would be a plus:

• Experience in writing Unit tests
• Native Development (Java/Kotlin, Objective-C/Swift)
• Creativity in solving different complex tasks
• Experience in web development, particularly with Next.js
• Experience setting up and maintaining mobile CI/CD pipelines (Azure Pipelines, Fastlane)


Why you will love it
At Patrianna, you'll be at the intersection of technology and entertainment, building innovative solutions that shape the future of social gaming. You'll thrive in our high-performance environment where speed, ambition, and bold ideas drive everything we do. As part of our globally distributed team, you'll have the freedom to innovate, take ownership, and help lead the next wave of gaming innovation—all while seeing your work impact millions of players worldwide.


Other Benefits

Full Remote Work: Enjoy the flexibility of working remotely from wherever you feel most productive.
Generous Leave Policy: Take advantage of 30 days of paid time off, encompassing both v

source_jobs.title: Technology Compliance & Risk Analyst (GRC)
source_jobs.description:
About Patrianna

Patrianna is a fast-scaling product development company headquartered in Gibraltar, with a dynamic, global team powering our growth. We operate at the intersection of technology and entertainment, building innovative solutions that shape the future of social gaming and deliver outstanding experiences to millions of players worldwide.

We're driven by speed, ambition, and bold ideas. At our core, we're product creators and problem-solvers who thrive in a high-performance environment. We're looking for exceptional talent—smart, adaptable, and motivated individuals eager to make an impact, scale business functions at pace, and continuously improve.

Whether you're a domain expert or an agile thinker who thrives in change, at Patrianna you'll have the freedom to innovate, take ownership, and help us lead the next wave of gaming innovation. Join us—and be part of something extraordinary.




THE ROLE

Own the vendor and third-party risk lifecycle for a fast-scaling tech company, while supporting the wider GRC programme across ISMS, privacy, and compliance.




WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING

 - Third-Party Risk (Champion) — Own the full vendor risk lifecycle: due diligence, security questionnaires, risk rating, contractual safeguards (DPAs, security schedules), and ongoing monitoring. Maintain the supplier register and drive reassessment cadence based on criticality.

 - Supplier Assurance — Track fourth-party dependencies and concentration risk across critical suppliers, aligning oversight with DORA ICT third-party requirements and ISO 27001 supplier controls.

 - ISMS & Audit Readiness — Support policy maintenance, control mapping, and evidence collection to keep the Statement of Applicability (SoA) current and audit-ready across the entities and clients you cover.

 - Risk Management & RCSA — Execute risk assessments using an ISO 31000-aligned methodology and contribute to Risk & Control Self-Assessment workshops and remediation tracking.

 - Privacy Operations — Support RoPA maintenance, DPIAs, and data subject requests — with a focus on processor and controller arrangements with vendors and group entities.

 - Governance Reporting — Prepare third-party risk materials for governance committees and keep registers accurate, visible, and current.




WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

 - Solid GRC grounding — A proven track record in GRC, IT audit, vendor risk, or information security, with hands-on third-party/supplier risk responsibility.

 - Third-party risk proficiency — Practical experience running vendor due diligence, security questionnaires (SIG, CAIQ, or equivalent), and contractual risk review.

 - Framework knowledge — Working knowledge of ISO/IEC 27001:2022 supplier controls, ISO 31000, and GDPR processor obligations; familiarity with DORA third-party requirements is a plus.

 - Independent thinker — You go beyond the checklist — you understand the why behind a control, spot gaps, and propose improvements without being prompted.

 - Pragmatic compliance mindset — You see GRC as a business enabler, not a blocker, and know how to balance rigor with momentum.

 - Clear communicator — Precise, confident writing across questionnaires, risk memos, and supplier-facing responses that need minimal oversight.




WHY YOU WILL LOVE IT

At Patrianna, GRC isn't a back-office function — it's central to how we scale responsibly. You'll take real ownership of a critical domain, work alongside infrastructure, security, procurement, and product teams, and see the direct impact of your work on how the business grows and operates.

You'll have the autonomy to shape how third-party risk is managed at a company moving fast, with the support of a GRC & Assurance Manager who values initiative and independent thinking. If you want a role where you can build something meaningful — not just maintain it — this is it.



Nice to haves: Experience in iGaming, fintech, or other regulated sectors; exposure to TPRM/GRC platforms (OneTrust, ProcessUnity

source_jobs.title: Lead Java Engineer (Payments)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT PATRIANNA

Patrianna is a fast-scaling product development company headquartered in Gibraltar, with a dynamic, global team powering our growth. We operate at the intersection of technology and entertainment, building innovative solutions that shape the future of social gaming and deliver outstanding experiences to millions of players worldwide.

We’re driven by speed, ambition, and bold ideas. At our core, we’re product creators and problem-solvers who thrive in a high-performance environment. We’re looking for exceptional talent—smart, adaptable, and motivated individuals eager to make an impact, scale business functions at pace, and continuously improve.




AI-DRIVEN ENGINEERING CULTURE

We are actively building an AI-driven engineering organization with a clear and deliberate stance: artificial intelligence is a core part of how we build and deliver software — not an experiment, not a trend, and not an optional add-on.

AI is embedded into our engineering workflows, from system design and prototyping to refactoring, testing, and code review. We expect engineers to be fully comfortable working in AI-driven environments and to treat AI as a primary productivity multiplier. Strong engineering judgment, architectural ownership, and accountability remain essential—AI amplifies our engineers, it doesn't replace responsibility for technical decisions.




WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR

We are looking for an experienced Lead Java Developer to join our dynamic team and contribute to the development of the innovative Social Casino domain. This role is ideal for someone with a strong technical background who is passionate about coding and architecture but also has a knack for leadership and mentoring. While your immediate focus will be on delivering robust technical solutions, this position also offers the opportunity to grow into a team leadership role. In this role, you will:

 - Lead the design of system architecture, ensuring scalability, reliability, and performance for current and future needs

 - Perform thorough code reviews, ensuring best practices, backward compatibility and maintainability of the solution

 - Analyze and improve the performance of existing applications, identifying bottlenecks and proposing innovative solutions

 - Ensure adherence to best security practices in the development and deployment of solutions

 - You will oversee a complex ecosystem of Payment Orchestrators, Global Processors, and Local Payment Methods, ensuring that our players experience zero friction from purchase to withdrawal

 - Lead the seamless integration of third-party Gateways, Vaulting services, and Alternative Payment Methods across diverse global markets

 - Own the end-to-end production health of the payment stack. Implement advanced monitoring, automated reconciliation, and rapid-response protocols for transaction failures

 - Serve as the technical bridge between development, QA, and product teams to ensure alignment on solutions and deliverables

 - Collaborate with product and project managers to plan iteration scopes and ensure timely delivery

 - Be a dependable point of contact for critical decision-making and delivery

If you’re passionate about building high-quality solutions and ready to make an impact, we’d love to have you on our team.




REQUIREMENTS

 - Solid experience building and maintaining production systems using Java and its ecosystem

 - Solid Java knowledge with a strong understanding of JVM internals

 - Excellent system design skills, capable of describing, documenting, and implementing complex architectures for scalable systems

 - Excellent knowledge of relational database principles, preferably PostgreSQL, with proficiency in query optimization and performance tuning

 - AI-native mindset with deep, hands-on expertise leveraging AI tools, large language models, and autonomous agents as a default approach to problem-solving, system design, and engineering productivity.

 - Deep understanding of messaging

source_jobs.title: Senior Java Engineer
source_jobs.description:
About Patrianna
Patrianna is a fast-scaling product development company headquartered in Gibraltar, with a dynamic, global team powering our growth. We operate at the intersection of technology and entertainment, building innovative solutions that shape the future of social gaming and deliver outstanding experiences to millions of players worldwide.

We're driven by speed, ambition, and bold ideas. At our core, we're product creators and problem-solvers who thrive in a high-performance environment. We're looking for exceptional talent-smart, adaptable, and motivated individuals eager to make an impact, scale business functions at pace, and continuously improve.




AI-DRIVEN ENGINEERING CULTURE

We are actively building an AI-driven engineering organization with a clear and deliberate stance: artificial intelligence is a core part of how we build and deliver software — not an experiment, not a trend, and not an optional add-on.

AI is embedded into our engineering workflows, from system design and prototyping to refactoring, testing, and code review. We rely on AI to significantly influence how work is done and to accelerate delivery, while maintaining a high bar for code quality, system reliability, and architectural clarity.

We expect engineers to be fully comfortable working in AI-driven environments and to treat AI as a primary productivity multiplier. Preference for AI-free workflows or resistance to AI-assisted development is NOT aligned with how we operate.

Strong engineering judgment, architectural ownership, and accountability remain essential. AI amplifies our engineers — it does not replace responsibility for technical decisions.



What you will be doing
• Design and deliver clean, scalable, and testable Java-based backend systems with minimal supervision
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including backend, web, mobile, QA, and product teams
• Take ownership of specific services or functional areas within our large-scale architecture
• Leverage AI tools and assistants as integral parts of your development workflow—from system design to code review
• Contribute to maintaining high test coverage, predictable production behavior, and seamless scalability
• Drive engineering excellence through modern practices and continuous improvement


What we are looking for
• Extensive production experience with Java and its ecosystem
• Solid understanding of relational database principles (preferably PostgreSQL) and messaging concepts (preferably Kafka)
• Strong system design, troubleshooting and debugging capabilities
• Comfortable and proactive in using AI coding assistants (GitHub Copilot, Claude Code, etc.) as productivity multipliers
• Practical experience validating, refining, and taking ownership of AI-generated output
• Upper-intermediate or higher level of English



Why you will love it
You'll be at the forefront of AI-driven engineering in a fast-scaling environment where your code directly impacts millions of users. Work with cutting-edge technology (latest Java, Spring Boot, GCP, Kubernetes) while enjoying full remote flexibility, generous leave, and real opportunities for growth. Join a team that treats AI as a core engineering tool—not an experiment—and where engineering excellence, speed, and meaningful impact are part of everyday work.

source_jobs.title: Product Analytics Team Lead
source_jobs.description:
PATRIANNA IS A FAST-SCALING PRODUCT DEVELOPMENT POWERHOUSE HEADQUARTERED IN GIBRALTAR, POWERED BY A DYNAMIC GLOBAL TEAM. OPERATING AT THE INTERSECTION OF TECHNOLOGY AND ENTERTAINMENT, WE BUILD INNOVATIVE SOLUTIONS THAT DEFINE THE FUTURE OF SOCIAL GAMING AND DELIVER EXCEPTIONAL EXPERIENCES TO MILLIONS OF PLAYERS WORLDWIDE.


WE ARE DRIVEN BY SPEED, AMBITION, AND BOLD IDEAS. AT OUR CORE, WE ARE PRODUCT CREATORS AND PROBLEM-SOLVERS WHO THRIVE IN HIGH-PERFORMANCE ENVIRONMENTS. WE ARE LOOKING FOR EXCEPTIONAL TALENT—SMART, ADAPTABLE, AND MOTIVATED INDIVIDUALS EAGER TO MAKE AN IMPACT, SCALE BUSINESS FUNCTIONS AT PACE, AND DRIVE CONTINUOUS IMPROVEMENT.


WHETHER YOU ARE A DOMAIN EXPERT OR AN AGILE THINKER WHO THRIVES ON CHANGE, AT PATRIANNA YOU WILL HAVE THE FREEDOM TO INNOVATE, TAKE OWNERSHIP, AND HELP US LEAD THE NEXT WAVE OF GAMING INNOVATION.


JOIN US—AND BE PART OF SOMETHING EXTRAORDINARY!


The Role
Lead and build a new analytics team that drives product growth through data-driven insights and AI-powered analysis.



What you will be doing
• Define and execute the analytics roadmap, guiding proactive analyses to uncover growth opportunities
• Build and mentor a high-performing team of analysts, establishing excellence in SQL, visualization, and statistical methods
• Champion AI integration to optimize analytical workflows and unlock deeper product insights
• Partner closely with Product Managers as their primary data ally, translating complex findings into clear, actionable recommendations
• Collaborate with data engineers and implementation specialists to prioritize tracking, define schemas, and guide data modeling
• Enable broader analytics teams through training on behavioral data usage, querying best practices, and dataset documentation

What we are looking for
• Extensive background in Product Analytics or Digital Analytics with deep domain expertise
• Proven people management experience, including hiring and developing analytical talent
• Advanced SQL mastery for large datasets, including window functions, CTEs, and nested JSON data handling
• Strong A/B testing foundation—calculating sample sizes, defining metrics, and determining statistical significance
• Experience building impactful business dashboards using tools like Looker, Tableau, or Power BI
• Hands-on experience analyzing raw client-side tracking data from platforms like GA4, Snowplow, or Amplitude



Why you will love it
You'll have the unique opportunity to build something from the ground up—shaping both a team and our entire analytics approach. source_jobs.title: Product Analytics Team Lead
source_jobs.description:
PATRIANNA IS A FAST-SCALING PRODUCT DEVELOPMENT POWERHOUSE HEADQUARTERED IN GIBRALTAR, POWERED BY A DYNAMIC GLOBAL TEAM. OPERATING AT THE INTERSECTION OF TECHNOLOGY AND ENTERTAINMENT, WE BUILD INNOVATIVE SOLUTIONS THAT DEFINE THE FUTURE OF SOCIAL GAMING AND DELIVER EXCEPTIONAL EXPERIENCES TO MILLIONS OF PLAYERS WORLDWIDE.


WE ARE DRIVEN BY SPEED, AMBITION, AND BOLD IDEAS. AT OUR CORE, WE ARE PRODUCT CREATORS AND PROBLEM-SOLVERS WHO THRIVE IN HIGH-PERFORMANCE ENVIRONMENTS. WE ARE LOOKING FOR EXCEPTIONAL TALENT—SMART, ADAPTABLE, AND MOTIVATED INDIVIDUALS EAGER TO MAKE AN IMPACT, SCALE BUSINESS FUNCTIONS AT PACE, AND DRIVE CONTINUOUS IMPROVEMENT.


WHETHER YOU ARE A DOMAIN EXPERT OR AN AGILE THINKER WHO THRIVES ON CHANGE, AT PATRIANNA YOU WILL HAVE THE FREEDOM TO INNOVATE, TAKE OWNERSHIP, AND HELP US LEAD THE NEXT WAVE OF GAMING INNOVATION.


JOIN US—AND BE PART OF SOMETHING EXTRAORDINARY!


The Role
Lead and build a new analytics team that drives product growth through data-driven insights and AI-powered analysis.



What you will be doing
• Define and execute the analytics roadmap, guiding proactive analyses to uncover growth opportunities
• Build and mentor a high-performing team of analysts, establishing excellence in SQL, visualization, and statistical methods
• Champion AI integration to optimize analytical workflows and unlock deeper product insights
• Partner closely with Product Managers as their primary data ally, translating complex findings into clear, actionable recommendations
• Collaborate with data engineers and implementation specialists to prioritize tracking, define schemas, and guide data modeling
• Enable broader analytics teams through training on behavioral data usage, querying best practices, and dataset documentation

What we are looking for
• Extensive background in Product Analytics or Digital Analytics with deep domain expertise
• Proven people management experience, including hiring and developing analytical talent
• Advanced SQL mastery for large datasets, including window functions, CTEs, and nested JSON data handling
• Strong A/B testing foundation—calculating sample sizes, defining metrics, and determining statistical significance
• Experience building impactful business dashboards using tools like Looker, Tableau, or Power BI
• Hands-on experience analyzing raw client-side tracking data from platforms like GA4, Snowplow, or Amplitude



Why you will love it
You'll have the unique opportunity to build something from the ground up—shaping both a team and our entire analytics approach. Working in our high-pace, high-growth environment means your insights will directly influence product decisions that impact millions of players. You'll be empowered to take ownership, experiment with cutting-edge AI tools, and see the real-world impact of your work every day. Plus, you'll collaborate with brilliant minds who value your expertise and give you the freedom to innovate.

Equal Opportunities Statement
We hire based on skills, drive, and ideas—nothing else. Your background, gender, age, race, ethnicity, disability, sexual orientation, religion, neurodiversity, or educational path will never be a barrier to joining us. We also welcome candidates from non-traditional career journeys and value diverse perspectives that challenge conventional thinking. Diversity fuels our innovation, collaboration, and growth, and we're committed to creating an environment where everyone can contribute their best work and thrive.

source_jobs.title: Middle Automation QA Engineer
source_jobs.description:
About Patrianna
Patrianna is a fast-scaling product development company headquartered in Gibraltar, with a dynamic, global team powering our growth. We operate at the intersection of technology and entertainment, building innovative solutions that shape the future of social gaming and deliver outstanding experiences to millions of players worldwide.
We're driven by speed, ambition, and bold ideas. At our core, we're product creators and problem-solvers who thrive in a high-performance environment. We're looking for exceptional talent—smart, adaptable, and motivated individuals eager to make an impact, scale business functions at pace, and continuously improve.



AI-Driven Engineering Culture

We are actively building an AI-driven engineering organization with a clear and deliberate stance: artificial intelligence is a core part of how we build and deliver software — not an experiment, not a trend, and not an optional add-on.
AI is embedded into our engineering workflows, from system design and prototyping to refactoring, testing, and code review. We expect engineers to be fully comfortable working in AI-driven environments and to treat AI as a primary productivity multiplier. Strong engineering judgment, architectural ownership, and accountability remain essential — AI amplifies our engineers, it doesn’t replace responsibility for technical decisions.


The Role
You'll be the quality guardian of our social gaming platform, building robust automation frameworks that ensure seamless experiences for millions of players worldwide.


What you will be doing
• Design and implement comprehensive automation test suites for web, mobile, and API components
• Validate requirements and transform manual test cases into efficient automated solutions
• Configure and maintain CI/CD pipelines to ensure continuous quality delivery
• Analyze automation results, troubleshoot issues, and provide detailed reporting to stakeholders
• Collaborate on technical standardization and contribute to operational excellence initiatives
• Maintain and extend mobile automation frameworks while supporting backend test coverage


What we are looking for
• Strong expertise in Java automation with deep knowledge of Java Core (Java 8+)
• Proven experience with mobile app automation using Appium+Selenide and Playwright for UI testing
• Solid background in API testing methodologies using tools like RestAssured
• Proficiency with both SQL and NoSQL databases, HTML/CSS/DOM, and XPath/CSS selectors
• Excellent understanding of software testing theory, client-server architecture, and browser dev tools
• Strong analytical mindset with exceptional communication skills and ability to work independently


Why you will love it
Join a high-pace, high-growth environment where your expertise directly shapes gaming experiences for millions. You'll thrive in our ego-free collaboration culture, take ownership of critical quality initiatives, and see real impact from day one. Plus, enjoy full remote flexibility, 30 days PTO, health/sport compensation, and continuous learning opportunities in a company where innovation never stops.



Benefits:

Generous Leave Policy: Take advantage of paid time off, encompassing both vacation and sick leave, to ensure you can recharge and recover when needed. Take your time on bank holidays as well.

Continuously Development: Get an opportunity to join a fast-growing business where the sky’s the limit.

Company Events: Engage in our vibrant company culture through a variety of informal events designed to foster camaraderie and teamwork.

Full Remote Work: Enjoy the flexibility of working remotely from wherever you feel most productive.

source_jobs.title: DevOps Engineer
source_jobs.description:
About Patrianna

Patrianna is a fast-scaling product development company headquartered in Gibraltar, with a dynamic, global team powering our growth. We operate at the intersection of technology and entertainment, building innovative solutions that shape the future of social gaming and deliver outstanding experiences to millions of players worldwide.

We're driven by speed, ambition, and bold ideas. At our core, we're product creators and problem-solvers who thrive in a high-performance environment. We're looking for exceptional talent—smart, adaptable, and motivated individuals eager to make an impact, scale business functions at pace, and continuously improve.

Whether you're a domain expert or an agile thinker who thrives in change, at Patrianna you'll have the freedom to innovate, take ownership, and help us lead the next wave of gaming innovation.

Join us—and be part of something extraordinary.



The Role

You'll architect and operate the infrastructure backbone that powers millions of gaming experiences, driving platform reliability and scalability at pace.



What you will be doing

• Design, operate, and evolve production-grade Kubernetes clusters with focus on high availability, scaling, networking, and security

• Lead incident response and troubleshooting across distributed systems, conducting thorough postmortems to drive continuous improvement

• Build and maintain robust CI/CD and release pipelines using GitHub Actions, Jenkins, and Azure DevOps

• Manage Infrastructure as Code and environments using Terraform, Terragrunt, and Helm

• Implement GitOps-based deployments with Argo CD for seamless, automated releases

• Drive observability and alerting strategies using Prometheus, Grafana, and Loki/ELK to ensure system health



What we are looking for

• Strong production experience with Google Cloud Platform including Compute Engine, GKE, networking, IAM, DNS, and cost optimization

• Deep hands-on expertise with Kubernetes architecture, networking, ingress, storage, autoscaling, and upgrades

• Proven experience with Terraform, Terragrunt, and Helm in production environments

• Solid CI/CD and GitOps expertise, particularly with Argo CD

• Strong Linux, networking, and troubleshooting skills including TCP/IP, DNS, and TLS

• Experience with on-call rotations and incident management using tools like PagerDuty



Why you will love it

You'll work at the cutting edge of gaming infrastructure, solving complex technical challenges that directly impact millions of players worldwide. With our high-growth environment, you'll have continuous opportunities to learn new technologies, drive meaningful improvements, and shape the platform that powers our next wave of innovation. Plus, you'll be part of an ego-free, collaborative team where your expertise is valued and your impact is immediately visible.



Other Benefits

Full Remote Work: Enjoy the flexibility of working remotely from wherever you feel most productive.
Generous Leave Policy: Take advantage of 30 days of paid time off, encompassing both vacation and sick leave, to ensure you can recharge and recover when needed. Take your time on bank holidays as well.
Company Events: Engage in our vibrant company culture through a variety of informal events designed to foster camaraderie and teamwork.
Continuously Development: Get an opportunity to join a fast-growing business where the sky’s the limit.

source_jobs.title: CRM BI Analyst
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT PATRIANNA

Patrianna is a fast-growing product development company headquartered in Gibraltar, with a globally distributed team delivering seamless, engaging, and scalable gaming experiences for millions of players worldwide.

We're building a world-class operational engine and seeking talented professionals in CRM, fraud & risk, payments, marketing, and player support who excel in fast-paced, high-growth settings. Our teams prioritize smart execution, continuous improvement, and cross-functional collaboration—empowering you to drive real impact from day one.


WHAT YOU WILL DO

 - Analyze gaming economy health and player behavior to identify revenue optimization opportunities

 - Partner with CRM teams to design, track, and analyze campaigns, building player segmentation models to maximize lifetime value

 - Develop advanced Tableau and Looker dashboards plus automated reports for real-time player lifecycle visibility

 - Translate data science models into actionable monetization solutions for leadership

 - Validate features via A/B testing and statistical analysis to champion a testing culture

 - Forecast impacts of gamification features on engagement and spend, then measure results


WHAT WE NEED

 - Gaming industry experience in BI/data analysis for monetization, gamification, or CRM analytics

 - Proven support for CRM teams on reporting and lifecycle strategies

 - Advanced SQL for large-scale data, plus Tableau, Looker, or Power BI visualization skills

 - Knowledge of player behavior, virtual economies, and gamification mechanics

 - Strong communication to deliver clear recommendations to non-technical stakeholders

 - Proactive problem-solving for trends and data integrity


WHY JOIN US

Be the analytical backbone for revenue impact across multiple gaming brands, shaping experiences for millions. Enjoy autonomy to innovate, own critical insights, and influence strategy in a high-growth environment. Collaborate with passionate teams valuing execution and learning, with competitive compensation and career growth.

source_jobs.title: Data Engineer
source_jobs.description:
About Patrianna

Patrianna is a fast-scaling product development company headquartered in Gibraltar, with a dynamic, global team powering our growth. We operate at the intersection of technology and entertainment, building innovative solutions that shape the future of social gaming and deliver outstanding experiences to millions of players worldwide.

We're driven by speed, ambition, and bold ideas. At our core, we're product creators and problem-solvers who thrive in a high-performance environment. The Role

Design, build, and manage advanced data systems that turn raw player data into actionable insights, powering personalized gaming experiences for millions.

What you will be doing

• Develop batch and real-time data pipelines on our GCP platform
• Build APIs to share data with other teams and develop CI/CD pipelines for automated deployments
• Develop Terraform IAC for deploying core infrastructure and use Datastream to ingest CDC data
• Use Dataform and dbt to build medallion data architecture while optimizing BigQuery and ClickHouse models
• Build Airflow DAG pipelines for data imports/exports with monitoring and alerting for data integrity
• Uphold GDPR/CCPA compliance and maintain data governance standards across platforms

What we are looking for

• Strong proficiency in Bash, Git, SQL and Python (essential skills)
• Hands-on experience with Terraform IAC, Docker and Kubernetes
• Solid GCP expertise including BigQuery, Dataform, Airflow, and Datastream
• Real-time processing experience with Kafka, PySpark, or Flink
• Proven ETL/CI-CD development skills and API development capabilities
• Bachelor's in Computer Science, Data Science, Information Systems, or equivalent experience

Why you will love it

Your pipelines will personalize gaming experiences for millions while detecting fraud and driving monetization. You'll work with cutting-edge GCP technology, enjoy autonomy in your role, and learn from a collaborative global team. We offer flexible remote options, professional development opportunities, and a culture that celebrates diverse ideas and breakthrough thinking.

Equal Opportunities

You'll be our legal strategist, navigating complex regulatory landscapes while driving compliance and risk management across our fast-growing gaming business.


WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING

• Lead legal work across corporate, commercial, IP and regulatory matters, drafting high-value agreements and managing organizational legal risk
• Partner with external counsel and provide legal support for product development, including intellectual property guidance
• Ensure corporate governance standards and collaborate with compliance teams on regulatory matters requiring legal input
• Research legal and compliance issues, review marketing campaigns for regulatory compliance, and stay current on industry legal trends
• Develop legal policies, template documentation, and drive process efficiencies while mentoring junior team members
• Handle legal correspondence, maintain contract records, and deliver internal training to support business-wide legal awareness


WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

• Qualified solicitor (UK or equivalent) with at least 5+ years post-qualification experience, including in-house exposure in tech, gaming, or digital sectors
• Broad expertise in commercial, regulatory, IP, data protection, and corporate law with strong research and analytical capabilities
• Exceptional written and verbal communication skills, able to translate complex legal concepts for non-legal stakeholders
• Detail-oriented approach with high accuracy in contract drafting, plus experience navigating multi-jurisdictional regulatory frameworks
• Proactive, hands-on mindset with ability to manage ambiguity and make sound decisions in fast-moving environments
• Solutions-focused commercial orientation with high standards of professionalism, discretion, and integrity


WHY YOU WILL LOVE IT

You'll work with a collaborative global team that genuinely values your expertise, tackling cutting-edge legal challenges in one of tech's most dynamic sectors. With real opportunities for growth and ownership, plus the flexibility to work in ways that suit you best, you'll help shape the future of digital entertainment while building your career in an environment where your contributions directly drive our mission forward.

AI is embedded into our engineering workflows, from system design and prototyping to refactoring, testing, and code review. We expect engineers to be fully comfortable working in AI-driven environments and to treat AI as a primary productivity multiplier. Strong engineering judgment, architectural ownership, and accountability remain essential—AI amplifies our engineers, it doesn’t replace responsibility for technical decisions.

What you will be doing
• Own delivery outcomes — ensure your cross-functional teams deliver reliable systems and meet commitments by coordinating priorities and execution
• Manage and develop people — including performance reviews, career development, and handling performance concerns when needed
• Maintain strong engineering standards — ensure teams follow established architecture patterns and quality standards while navigating complex technical trade-offs
• Enable effective team execution — work with Team Leads and Product Managers to ensure initiatives are clearly defined and teams can execute smoothly
• Improve engineering effectiveness — continuously refine how teams plan, coordinate, and deliver work as the organization scales
• Support system reliability — help teams investigate incidents, understand root causes, and strengthen platform reliability

What we are looking for
• Strong engineering background with extensive software development experience and deep backend expertise (Java ecosystem)
• System design experience building and operating high-load systems using modern backend technologies, event-driven architectures, and cloud-native infrastructure
• Proven track record leading engineering teams and delivering complex production systems while balancing technical leadership and people management
• Experience operating production systems and participating in incident response and post-incident improvements
• Strong product sense — ability to assess product initiatives and identify engineering implications, risks, and missing elements
• Strong delivery ownership with ability to produce realistic estimates, align stakeholders, and communicate scope options and trade-offs clearly



Nice to have:

 - Experience in iGaming or other high-load, real-time platforms

 - Experience transitioning from a senior IC role (e.g., Tech Lead, Staff Engineer, Principal Engineer, Solution Architect) into leadership

 - Familiarity with Java, Kafka, Kubernetes, or GCP

 - Experience working in product companies or scale-ups
   
   

Our Tech Stack

 - Java 25

 - Spring Boot 4

 - Google Cloud Platform:
   
   - Kubernetes
   
   - Kafka
   
   - AlloyDB for PostgreSQL

 - Ebean ORM

 - Flyway

 - Redis/

source_jobs.title: DevSecOps Engineer
source_jobs.description:
The Role
You'll design, implement, and continuously improve our security infrastructure while embedding security throughout our entire software development lifecycle.

What you will be doing
• Design and maintain security technologies including EDR solutions like CrowdStrike, Zero Trust Network Access, and Data Loss Prevention systems
• Integrate automated security testing into CI/CD pipelines, covering code analysis, dependency scanning, and secrets detection
• Implement and support Zero Trust security architecture using Palo Alto Prisma, GlobalProtect, and Cloudflare ZTNA solutions
• Manage cloud security posture controls across GCP environments, including misconfiguration detection and remediation
• Collaborate with SOC analysts to improve detection quality, reduce false positives, and enhance incident investigation capabilities
• Work with development teams during design phases to identify security risks early and perform security code reviews

What we are looking for
• Solid experience in security engineering, security operations, or security platform engineering
• Strong understanding of network security concepts including firewalls, VPNs, DNS, and network segmentation
• Hands-on experience implementing EDR solutions such as CrowdStrike and Zero Trust architectures
• Experience with Palo Alto Prisma, GlobalProtect, and Cloudflare security solutions
• Strong knowledge of Identity and Access Management (IAM) and Data Loss Prevention (DLP) controls
• Professional proficiency in English with strong analytical, investigative, and collaborative skills

Why you will love it
At Patrianna, you'll be at the forefront of securing cutting-edge social gaming experiences for millions of players worldwide. You'll have the freedom to innovate and take ownership of security solutions that directly impact our fast-scaling product development. Working in our high-performance, ego-free environment, you'll collaborate with brilliant minds across development, DevOps, and SOC teams while building your expertise in the latest security technologies. Every day brings new challenges and learning opportunities as you help shape the future of gaming security.

We hire based on skills, drive, and ideas—nothing else. Your background, gender, age, race, ethnicity, disability, sexual orientation, religion, neurodiversity, or educational path will never be a barrier to joining us. We also welcome candidates from non-traditional career journeys and value diverse perspectives that challenge conventional thinking. Diversity fuels our innovation, collaboration, and growth, and we're committed to creating an environment where everyone can contribute their best work and thrive.

source_jobs.title: Middle Java Engineer (Payments)
source_jobs.description:
About Patrianna


Patrianna is a fast-scaling product development company headquartered in Gibraltar, with a dynamic, global team powering our growth. We operate at the intersection of technology and entertainment, building innovative solutions that shape the future of social gaming and deliver outstanding experiences to millions of players worldwide.

We’re driven by speed, ambition, and bold ideas. At our core, we’re product creators and problem-solvers who thrive in a high-performance environment. We’re looking for exceptional talent-smart, adaptable, and motivated individuals eager to make an impact, scale business functions at pace, and continuously improve.




AI-DRIVEN ENGINEERING CULTURE

We are actively building an AI-driven engineering organization with a clear and deliberate stance: artificial intelligence is a core part of how we build and deliver software — not an experiment, not a trend, and not an optional add-on.

AI is embedded into our engineering workflows, from system design and prototyping to refactoring, testing, and code review. We expect engineers to be fully comfortable working in AI-driven environments and to treat AI as a primary productivity multiplier. Strong engineering judgment, architectural ownership, and accountability remain essential—AI amplifies our engineers, it doesn’t replace responsibility for technical decisions.



What you will be doing
• Develop and maintain robust Java applications using cutting-edge technologies like Java, Spring, and Kafka
• Optimize SQL performance and troubleshoot complex systems using metrics, monitoring, and profiling tools
• Build scalable, high-load systems that handle massive user volumes with seamless performance
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver features that directly impact player experience
• Implement automation and ensure code quality standards across development and production environments
• Work with modern tech stack including Docker, GCP, ELK, and reactive programming frameworks

Main technologies we use:
Java 25
Spring 7
Spring boot 4
Ebean-ORM
Quartz
Maven
Resteasy
Flyway
Postgresql 15
HTTP/Websockets
Netty
K8S/Docker
GCP
Jenkins
ELK, Grafana
Google Business Suite, JIRA/Confluence, Slack


What we are looking for
• Solid experience as a Java Engineer with strong knowledge of Java Core (Java 8+)
• Expertise in multithreading, high-load systems, and Spring framework
• Proven experience with SQL optimization and troubleshooting complex production issues
• Background working in product companies within collaborative, cross-functional teams
• Strong English communication skills for effective collaboration
• Passion for delivering high-quality code and driving technical excellence

Would be a plus:
• Production experience with Kafka and ecosystem
• Experience with Ebean
• Experience with Protobuf
• Experience with Kibana/ElasticSearch
• Experience with Grafana

Why you will love it
You’ll be at the forefront of AI-driven engineering in a fast-scaling environment where your code directly impacts millions of users. Work with cutting-edge technology (latest Java, Spring Boot, GCP, Kubernetes) while enjoying full remote flexibility, generous leave, and real opportunities for growth. Join a team that treats AI as a core engineering tool—not an experiment—and where engineering excellence, speed, and meaningful impact are part of everyday work.

source_jobs.title: Commercial Analytics Manager
source_jobs.description:
COMMERCIAL ANALYTICS MANAGER

About Patrianna
Patrianna is a fast-scaling product development company headquartered in Gibraltar, with a dynamic, global team powering our growth. We operate at the intersection of technology and entertainment, building innovative solutions that shape the future of social gaming and deliver outstanding experiences to millions of players worldwide.

We're driven by speed, ambition, and bold ideas. At our core, we're product creators and problem-solvers who thrive in a high-performance environment. We're looking for exceptional talent — smart, adaptable, and motivated individuals eager to make an impact, scale business functions at pace, and continuously improve.

Whether you're a domain expert or an agile thinker who thrives in change, at Patrianna you'll have the freedom to innovate, take ownership, and help us lead the next wave of gaming innovation.

Join us — and be part of something extraordinary.




THE ROLE

You'll be the strategic brain behind our social casino portfolio, leading with relentless curiosity to uncover the "why" behind every number and driving your team to think like brand owners.




WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING

• Drive deep-dive investigations into KPI shifts, going beyond surface-level reporting to uncover root causes and hidden trends
• Lead and mentor a team of Brand Analysts, developing them from data reporters into strategic co-owners of their respective brands
• Maintain 360-degree oversight of the entire business ecosystem, monitoring how acquisition, CRM, and fraud initiatives impact each other
• Bridge business and data science teams, translating complex commercial needs into technical requirements for ML models
• Create innovative segmentation strategies that enhance predictive model accuracy for churn, LTV, and propensity modeling
• Act as the final gatekeeper for brand health, ensuring growth in one area doesn't compromise performance elsewhere




WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

• Proven commercial or analytical experience within Social Gaming or iGaming environments
• Strong P&L mindset with business owner mentality focused on optimization and efficiency
• Leadership experience with passion for developing analytical talent into strategic thinkers
• Technical literacy including understanding of data structures, SQL, and how Machine Learning creates business value
• Natural drive to dig deeper into data until the hidden truth is uncovered
• Ability to challenge the status quo by asking second and third-order questions that lead to deeper business understanding.




WHY YOU WILL LOVE IT

You'll thrive in our high-pace, high-growth environment where your curiosity directly shapes million-dollar decisions. Every insight you uncover translates into real business impact, while you build and lead a team that thinks strategically about the brands they own. You'll have the freedom to innovate your approach to analysis while working at the cutting edge of gaming analytics and machine learning.

Equal Opportunities Statement
We hire based on skills, drive, and ideas — nothing else. Your background, gender, age, race, ethnicity, disability, sexual orientation, religion, neurodiversity, or educational path will never be a barrier to joining us. We also welcome candidates from non-traditional career journeys and value diverse perspectives that challenge conventional thinking.
Diversity fuels our innovation, collaboration, and growth, and we're committed to creating an environment where everyone can contribute their best work and thrive.

source_jobs.title: Digital Analyst - Product
source_jobs.description:
Patrianna is a fast-scaling product development company headquartered in Gibraltar, with a dynamic, global team powering our growth. We operate at the intersection of technology and entertainment, building innovative solutions that shape the future of social gaming and deliver outstanding experiences to millions of players worldwide.

We're driven by speed, ambition, and bold ideas. At our core, we're product creators and problem-solvers who thrive in a high-performance environment. We're looking for exceptional talent—smart, adaptable, and motivated individuals eager to make an impact, scale business functions at pace, and continuously improve.

The Role
Transform data into actionable insights that drive product decisions and enhance player experiences across our gaming platforms.

What you will be doing
• Guide product team members through complex data landscapes, providing valuable insights that support critical decision-making
• Conduct deep-dive analyses of user behavior, app performance, and product features to boost player acquisition, engagement, and retention
• Ensure top-tier behavioral data collection by collaborating with analytics developers on tracking implementation and issue resolution
• Develop and maintain dashboards, reports, and alerting systems for real-time monitoring of key conversion metrics
• Present insights clearly and effectively to stakeholders across the organization
• Debug data issues and optimize tracking mechanisms to maintain data integrity

What we are looking for
• Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities with exceptional attention to detail
• Critical thinking mindset with proactive approach and high reliability

• Experience creating detailed reports and dashboards using tools like Looker or Tableau
• Familiarity with digital analytics platforms such as Snowplow and GA4, plus tracking mechanisms and data layers
• Experience with data modeling in Dataform and session replay/autotracking platforms is a bonus

Why you will love it
You'll be at the heart of product innovation, where your insights directly shape gaming experiences for millions of players. In our high-growth environment, you'll have the freedom to take ownership of impactful projects while collaborating with brilliant minds who value your expertise.
